goldsync 1.2025.10.4+75d59573a011cf64e004d103915f8af822d98561
Copyright (C) 2026 Riccardo Gregori

  config        Set-up the connections to Azure DevOps instances

  test          Test the connection towards all the configured Azure DevOps
                instances.

  sync          Takes all the bugs from conn 1 or 2 that are not in conn 3, and
                creates them.

  get-item      Prints the data extracted from a given workitem

  show-query    Shows the query that is used to retrieve the bugs from the
                source environments.

  list-tags     Lists all the tag mappings configured

  set-tag       Adds or updates a given tag mapping

  help          Display more information on a specific command.

  version       Display version information.

  config        Set-up the connections to Azure DevOps instances

  test          Test the connection towards all the configured Azure DevOps

  get-item      Prints the data extracted from a given workitem

result.stderr:
goldsync 1.2025.10.4+75d59573a011cf64e004d103915f8af822d98561
Copyright (C) 2026 Riccardo Gregori

  --o1                Required. The name of the first Azure DevOps organization

  --p1                Required. The name of the first Azure DevOps project

  --t1                Required. The personal access token for the first Azure
                      DevOps organization

  --area1             Required. The name of the area path where the bug should
                      be created in the target env if read from env1

  --it1               Required. The name of the iteration path where the bug
                      should be created in the target env if read from env1

  --testPhase1        Required. The name of the test phase on the target env if
                      read from env1

  --o2                Required. The name of the second Azure DevOps organization

  --p2                Required. The name of the second Azure DevOps project

  --t2                Required. The personal access token for the second Azure
                      DevOps organization

  --area2             Required. The name of the area path where the bug should
                      be created in the target env if read from env1

  --it2               Required. The name of the iteration path where the bug
                      should be created in the target env if read from env2

  --testPhase2        Required. The name of the test phase on the target env if
                      read from env1

  --o3                Required. The name of the third Azure DevOps organization

  --p3                Required. The name of the third Azure DevOps project

  --t3                Required. The personal access token for the third Azure
                      DevOps organization

  --assignedToId      Required. The ID of the user to assign the bugs to

  --assignedToName    Required. The Name of the user to assign the bugs to

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.
